rationale: Build on the current soft quant-aware winner, but pivot away from another projection-only schedule replay. This version improves the final int8 path itself by letting each 2D tensor choose among rowwise, mean-offset, midpoint-offset, and transposed-axis rowwise encodings, then keeps the late soft roundtrip ramp but scales each tensor's blend by its actual quantization error so low-distortion tensors are disturbed less while hard tensors still adapt strongly. That directly targets final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact val_bpb, stays under the 1500-line cap, preserves the official evaluation path and final marker, and avoids spending artifact budget on new FP16 payload.
title: Error-Adaptive Soft Ramp With Axis-Mixed Int8
